everytime i go to upgrade a phone, i get \"talked into a \"better\" price plan\" and it was insurance included. however all my phones already had insurance.  but before i could write anything, because i couldn't talk do to mouth surgery, it was all done. so im paying 100 bucks more. on top of that never got my phone upgraded and now have to wait 10 business days due to some glitch in the system. it's been one thing after another with xfinity. i'm so tired of them.

i am incredibly grateful to xfinity for the opportunities, support, and growth i’ve experienced throughout my journey with the company. xfinity has provided an environment where i have been able to develop my leadership skills, build meaningful relationships with both customers and team members, and continuously challenge myself to achieve higher goals. the company’s commitment to innovation, customer service, and employee development inspires me every day. being part of a team that works hard to connect people and make a positive impact in our communities is something i take great pride in. i appreciate the trust, guidance, and encouragement i’ve received, and i am proud to represent a company that values excellence, teamwork, and dedication. xfinity has helped me grow both professionally and personally, and i look forward to continuing to contribute to its success while helping customers find the best solutions for their needs.

your customer support said i could come replace my xfi pod in store i drove 55 minutes to get to the closest store and the first guy i spoke to with the painted nails was just very rude to me and told me that it's impossible to get it replaced today when i explained i was upset having been told i could and then driving 55 minutes to get here he said you will need to get one mailed to you by the end of the week or next week no compensation for the inconvenience that came with the mix up between your online support and in-store staff i'm a loyal member have been for a long time but that really annoyed me with the service provided

first off, i was very disappointed with the service i received. on top of my discontent, i stood next to other complaining customers. my biggest disappointment with xfinity is the cell phone service i was duped into signing up for. it was pitched to me as free cell service for one year. when i went to the store to get assistance with a activation, i was told the free service was not as good as another service that's cost me money monthly😡who does that..offer 2 cell services within the same company? i know of no one else that does that and if i discover anyone else that does it, i'm staying away.

we switched our phone lines from at&t to xfinity. we spoke with two different xfinity agents and unfortunately, both agents screwed up our phone service and we spent over seven hours on the phone. we were told by the second conversation that we had to go to an xfinity store to resolve our problem. after all the hassles and headaches, thankfully the xfinity store in burbank illinois was able to help us finish and get her phone back working. i'm not sure why xfinity has agents talking to us all over the country of the world and really aren't well-versed in what's going on. xfinity has two strikes against them so hopefully our problems ourselves then we enjoy our phone service with xfinity along with our internet kudos to the workers at the burbank store in illinois.
